subject: Screen share freezes for attendees
description: Host shares PowerPoint; attendees see frozen slide while host sees live updates.

ts_steps.title: Optimize for video clip
ts_steps.action: Off for static slides; on for embedded video.

ts_steps.title: UDP path
ts_steps.action: Network team confirms Zoom UDP not blocked.

ts_steps.title: PDF share test
ts_steps.action: Export slides to PDF — if smooth, Office overlay issue.

internal_information: Packet loss, GPU, DPI, share mode choice.
